title: Charts - filter by Location
excerpt: I have create a chart/graph to show all the possession dates over the next year. I want to narrow this down by province or by City so I can see what deals I have in Ontario in the next year, or Mississauga.

posts.author: barburrito (Katherine Aikenhead)
posts.cookedHtml: I have create a chart/graph to show all the possession dates over the next year. I want to narrow this down by province or by City so I can see what deals I have in Ontario in the next year, or Mississauga.
